typography.rules: Never use Inter for headings. Use tight tracking (`tracking-tight`) on headings > 24px.

visual_enhancers.shadows: Minimal. Avoid dark dropshadows. Use `shadow-sm` and `1px border` for definition.
visual_enhancers.radius: rounded-md for buttons, rounded-lg for cards.
visual_enhancers.textures: Flat and clean. No gradients. Fast scanning is priority.

grids.dashboard_mode: High Density Grid (Mode B). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4. gap-4.
grids.ticket_list: flex flex-col gap-3 for rapid visual scanning.

layouts.sidebar: Fixed left sidebar, w-64, bg-white, border-r border-slate-200. Clean list items. On mobile, ensure it collapses into a hamburger menu.
layouts.header: Sticky top, h-16, bg-white, border-b border-slate-200, flex items-center justify-between px-6. 'Go to Platform →' button goes here.
layouts.main_content: ml-0 md:ml-64 bg-[#F8FAFC] min-h-screen p-4 md:p-6 overflow-y-auto.

motion.hover: Cards: -translate-y-[1px] and shadow-md. Buttons: hover:border-[#C9973A] hover:text-[#C9973A].

accessibility.contrast: Deep Navy (#1A1A2E) on White (#FFFFFF) passes WCAG AAA.
accessibility.test_ids: All buttons, links, and forms MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='ticket-card-reply-btn')

media.images: Not primarily an image-heavy view, but any avatars or pet images should be rounded-full, object-cover, border border-slate-200.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: The target file is 6,874 lines. DO NOT attempt to rewrite the whole file. DO NOT output the whole file.
Use view_range with view_file tool to inspect specific sections, or use search_replace to target CSS class replacements directly.
1. THEME SWITCH: Replace 'bg-slate-900', 'bg-slate-800', 'bg-gray-900' with 'bg-white' or 'bg-slate-50'. Replace 'text-white' or 'text-slate-100' with 'text-[#1A1A2E]'.

2. HEADER: Inject a 'Go to Platform →' button into the top header navigation. It must link to '/pet-home'. Use styling: px-4 py-2 border border-slate-200 text-[#1A1A2E] hover:text-[#C9973A] hover:border-[#C9973A] rounded-md transition-colors font-medium text-sm.

3. PILLAR NAMES: Search for occurrences of 'stay', 'enjoy', 'fit' in strings and UI labels. Replace them respectively with 'go', 'play', 'services'. (Watch out for case sensitivity like 'Stay' -> 'Go').
4. TICKETS: Update the ticket cards to have white background, subtle border, Deep Navy headings, and clear urgency indicators (🚨/🟢/🟡/⚪).
5. Keep existing application state, imports, and component methods strictly untouched.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (`transition: all`). Always add transitions for specific interactive elements.
You MUST NOT center align the app container. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Components MUST use named exports, Pages MUST use default exports.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute. Convention: kebab-case, role-based.
